  1. edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card

Uses of Package
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card

Packages that use edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card
Package
Description
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card
Components supporting standard Uno card deck containing 4 colors: Red, Yellow, Green, Blue 10 numeric values: 0..9, inclusive 5 actions: skip, reverse, draw 2, wild, wild draw 4 as follows 1 each: 0 of each color 2 each: 1..9 of each color 2 each: skip, reverse, draw 2 of each color 4 each: wild, wild draw 4 of any color (changeable during game play to any color)
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.game
Represent the game driver and game-specific components for Uno
edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.pile
Represent Uno playing cards (color, values and actions)
  • Classes in edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card used by edu.wit.scds.ds.lists.app.card_game.uno.card
    Class
    Description
    ActionCard
    Representation of a playing card with a color and value
    Card
    Representation of an Uno playing card with a color and values
    Card.CompareOn
    specifiers for which attributes of a Card should be used when comparing instances
    CardColor
    An enumeration of colors of cards in an Uno card deck.
    CardValue
    An enumeration of Uno card values
    CardValue.Kind
    tag for the kind of value
    NumberCard
    Representation of a playing card with a color and value
